fn parse_header(data: &[u8]) -> Vec<u8> {
    let header_bytes = data[..8].to_vec();
    header_bytes
}

fn hash_content(content: &[u8]) -> Vec<u8> {
    let bytes = content.to_vec();
    let hash = compute_hash(&bytes);
    hash.to_vec()
}

fn compute_hash(_data: &[u8]) -> [u8; 32] { [0u8; 32] }

fn extract_name(full: &[u8]) -> String {
    let vec = full.to_vec();
    String::from_utf8(vec).unwrap_or_default()
}
